items.raw_excerpt: Tasmanian police say a man fell from an oyster barge when it hit a sandbar and was briefly trapped. Member for Barker Tony Pasin says he and a staffer were injured and now receiving medical treatment, but it is not clear who fell from the barge.
items.summary_en: A federal MP and his staffer were hurt when a man fell from an oyster barge in Tasmania. The boat hit a sandbar and the person was briefly trapped. Both are now receiving medical treatment.
items.summary_ko: 태즈메이니아에서 굴 양식 바지선이 모래banks에 부딪히는 사고가 발생했습니다. 한 남성이 배에서 떨어져 잠시 갇혔으며, 연방의원과 보좌진이 다쳤습니다. 두 사람 모두 현재 치료를 받고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Federal MP and staffer injured in 'man overboard' incident
items.title_ko: 호주 연방의원과 보좌진, 굴 바지선 사고로 부상
items.title_original: Federal MP and staffer injured in 'man overboard' incident

items.raw_excerpt: Two years after a mass fish kill, Periyar fishers still seek compensation for significant losses due to river contamination.
items.summary_en: Two years after a mass fish kill in the Periyar River, fishers in Kerala are still waiting for compensation. The river contamination caused significant losses to the local fishing community. Despite repeated demands, the government has not yet provided the promised support.
items.summary_ko: 페리야르강에서 대량 물고기 폐사가 발생한 지 2년이 지났지만, 케랄라주 어민들은 여전히 보상을 기다리고 있습니다. 강 오염으로 인해 현지 어업 공동체가 큰 손실을 입었습니다. 반복적인 요구에도 불구하고, 정부는 아직 약속한 지원을 제공하지 않고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Mass fish kill: Two years on, Periyar fishers await compensation
items.title_ko: 대량 물고기 폐사 2년, 페리야르 어민 여전히 보상 기다려
items.title_original: Mass fish kill: Two years on, Periyar fishers await compensation

items.raw_excerpt: Several people over 70 years of age have died in drowning accidents recently. Elderly people are over-represented in the statistics – and men in particular.
items.summary_en: Several people over 70 years of age have died in drowning accidents in Sweden recently. Elderly people, especially men, are over-represented in the drowning statistics.
items.summary_ko: 최근 스웨덴에서 70대 이상 노인들의 익사 사고가 잇따르고 있다. 통계에 따르면 노인, 특히 남성이 익사 사고에서 과대 대표되고 있다.
items.title_en: Elderly men over-represented in drowning accidents in Sweden
items.title_ko: 스웨덴에서 노인 남성의 익사 사고 비율 높아
items.title_original: Elderly men over-represented in drowning accidents in Sweden

items.raw_excerpt: Moving to a new country can be daunting. This handy German expression captures the comforting idea that we're often linked to others in ways we never expected.
items.summary_en: The German expression 'Über drei Ecken' means having an indirect connection to someone. It captures the idea that we are often linked to others in unexpected ways. The phrase is useful for describing how small the world can be.
items.summary_ko: 독일어 표현 'Über drei Ecken'는 누군가와 간접적으로 연결되어 있다는 뜻입니다. 우리는 예상치 못한 방식으로 다른 사람들과 연결되어 있다는 편안한 개념을 담고 있습니다. 세상이 얼마나 좁은지 설명할 때 이 표현을 쓸 수 있습니다.
items.title_en: German Phrase of the Day: Über drei Ecken
items.title_ko: 오늘의 독일어 표현: Über drei Ecken
items.title_original: German phrase of the day: Über drei Ecken

items.raw_excerpt: From breathtaking landscapes to unbelievable football goals, the French love describing anything extraordinary as 'une dinguerie'.
items.summary_en: The French use the word 'une dinguerie' to describe anything extraordinary. From breathtaking landscapes to unbelievable football goals, this playful expression captures a sense of amazement. It is a popular and casual way to say something is simply wild or incredible.
items.summary_ko: 프랑스인들은 'dinguerie(딩구리)'라는 단어로 무언가 놀랍고 대단한 것을 표현합니다. 장관인 풍경부터 믿기 힘든 골까지, 이 재치 있는 표현은 경이로움을 담아냅니다. 무언가가 그저 엄청나거나 놀라울 때 가볍고 캐주얼하게 쓰는 말입니다.
items.title_en: French Word of the Day: Dinguerie
items.title_ko: 오늘의 프랑스어 표현: '딩구리'
items.title_original: French Word of the Day: Dinguerie

items.raw_excerpt: Summertime is the season for foraging in Norway. But what can you pick during the warmest months of the year, and where can you find the ever-elusive cloudberry?
items.summary_en: Summer is the best time to pick wild berries and flowers in Norway. You can find many different types of berries during the warm months. The cloudberry is a rare and special fruit that people love to find.
items.summary_ko: 여름은 노르웨이에서 야생 베리와 꽃을 채집하기 좋은 계절입니다. 따뜻한 날씨에는 다양한 종류의 베리를 찾을 수 있습니다. 클라우드베리는 사람들이 특히 찾는 희귀하고 특별한 과일입니다.
items.title_en: Five berries and flowers you can forage for in Norway this summer
items.title_ko: 이번 여름 노르웨이에서 채집할 수 있는 다섯 가지 베리와 꽃
items.title_original: Five berries and flowers you can forage for in Norway this summer

items.raw_excerpt: To gather support for its bid to strengthen Switzerland’s neutrality, which will be voted on in a referendum on September 27th, the Zurich section of the populist Swiss People’s Party (SVP) is relying on traditional costumes from... abroad.
items.summary_en: The Zurich branch of the Swiss People's Party is using traditional German costumes to rally support for a referendum to strengthen Switzerland's neutrality. The vote is set for September 27th. The party hopes the costumes from abroad will draw attention to its campaign.
items.summary_ko: 스위스 인민당 취리히 지부가 독일 전통의상을 활용해瑞士의 중립 강화 국민투표 지지를 모으고 있다. 투표는 9월 27일로 예정되어 있다. 해외 전통의상을 통해 캠페인에 주목을 끌려는 의도다.
items.title_en: Zurich far-right party uses German costumes to promote Swiss neutrality vote
items.title_ko: 스위스 극우 정당, 독일 전통의상으로 중립 강화 투표 홍보
items.title_original: Swiss hard-right promotes neutrality with German costumes

items.raw_excerpt: If you live in Vienna, you can enjoy unlimited access to many establishments - or services - with a yearly pass. Here we list the city's best passes.
items.summary_en: Living in Vienna comes with perks. The city offers many seasonal passes that give unlimited access to museums, pools, and other services. Here are the best annual passes to enjoy.
items.summary_ko: 비엔나에 살면 다양한 혜택을 누릴 수 있습니다. 도시에서는 박물관, 수영장 등 여러 시설을 무제한으로 이용할 수 있는 연간 패스가 많습니다. 여기 비엔나 최고의 연간 이용권들을 소개합니다.
items.title_en: Best Yearly Passes for Vienna Residents
items.title_ko: 비엔나 주민을 위한 최고의 연간 이용권
items.title_original: 'Jahreskarte': The best seasonal tickets to have if you live in Vienna

items.raw_excerpt: CM V.D. Satheesan launches Thiruvonam Bumper Lottery with a record ₹30 crore first prize; tickets on sale from July 20.
items.summary_en: Kerala Chief Minister V.D. Satheesan launched the Thiruvonam Bumper Lottery with a record first prize of 30 crore rupees. Tickets will go on sale from July 20. The lottery is a big event in the state every year ahead of the Onam festival.
items.summary_ko: 케랄라주 V.D. 사티산 수상이 30크로루피(약 500억원)의 역대 최대 1등 상금을 내건 티루보남 번퍼 복권을 출시했다. 티켓은 7월 20일부터 판매를 시작한다. 이 복권은 매년 오남 축제를 앞두고 케랄라주에서 큰 관심을 받는 행사다.
items.title_en: Kerala Chief Minister Launches Thiruvonam Bumper Lottery with Record Prize
items.title_ko: 케랄라 수상, 역대 최대 상금 '티루보남 번퍼 복권' 출시
items.title_original: CM V.D. Satheesan launches Thiruvonam Bumper Lottery with ₹30 crore first prize

items.raw_excerpt: July 16 : Italy coach Gonzalo Quesada has been handed a two-match suspension for comments he made following his side’s defeat by New Zealand last week, World Rugby said on Thursday.In an interview with Sky Sport after Italy's 47-17 thrashing in the Nations Championship, Quesada said referee Luc Ramos was "s
items.summary_en: Italy rugby coach Gonzalo Quesada has been suspended for two matches by World Rugby. He criticized referee Luc Ramos after Italy lost 47-17 to New Zealand in the Nations Championship. The suspension was announced on Thursday.
items.summary_ko: 세계 럭비(World Rugby)는 이탈리아 럭비 감독 곤잘로 케사다를 2경기 출장 정지 처분했다. 그는 네이션스 챔피언십에서 이탈리아가 뉴질랜드에 47-17로 대패한 뒤 루카스 라모스 주심을 강하게 비판하는 발언을 했다. 징계는 목요일 공식 발표되었다.
items.title_en: Italy Rugby Coach Gets Two-Match Ban After Criticizing Referee
items.title_ko: 이탈리아 럭비 감독, 심판 비판 발언으로 2경기 출장 정지
items.title_original: Italy coach Quesada receives two-match ban for comments about referee

items.raw_excerpt: A volunteer firefighter who was suspected of starting a fire in France's historic Fontainebleau forest was placed under formal investigation and remanded in custody on Wednesday, a prosecutor said.
items.summary_en: A volunteer firefighter is suspected of starting a fire in France's historic Fontainebleau forest. He was placed under formal investigation and remanded in custody on Wednesday. Wildfire risk remains high across many French regions.
items.summary_ko: 한 자원봉사 소방관이 프랑스의 역사적인 퐁텐블로 숲에서 낸 불 의심을 받고 있습니다. 그는 정식 조사를 받고 구금되었습니다. 프랑스 여러 지역에서 산불 위험이 여전히 높습니다.
items.title_en: French forest fire suspect arrested as wildfire risk remains high
items.title_ko: 산불 위험 높은 가운데 용의자 체포
items.title_original: French forest fire suspect arrested as wildfire risk remains high

items.raw_excerpt: In the latest edition of our Moving to Italy newsletter, we look at why climate may factor in more than you’d expect when deciding where to settle in Italy. And how for parents, planning ahead is essential for tackling Italy's 'challenging' summer holidays.
items.summary_en: Some Italian cities have better weather than others for year-round living. Parents moving to Italy need to plan ahead for the long summer school break.
items.summary_ko: 일부 이탈리아 도시는 사계절 살기 좋은 날씨를 자랑합니다. 이탈리아로 이사하는 부모들은 긴 여름 방학에 대비해 미리 준비해야 합니다.
items.title_en: Italy's Best Cities for Weather and Summer Childcare
items.title_ko: 날씨와 여름 육아에 좋은 이탈리아 도시들
items.title_original: Moving to Italy: The best climate cities and childcare for the long summer break

items.raw_excerpt: Data obtained by the South Australian opposition shows fewer ambulances are arriving on time to priority 3 and 4 patients.
items.summary_en: Data obtained by South Australia's opposition shows fewer ambulances are arriving on time for priority 3 and 4 patients. Lower-priority patients are facing longer wait times for emergency response. The opposition is raising concerns about declining ambulance performance in the state.
items.summary_ko: 남호주 야당이 확보한 자료에 따르면 3·4등급 저우선도 환자에게 구급차가 제시간에 도착하는 비율이 줄고 있는 것으로 나타났다. 환자들의 대기 시간이 길어지면서 구급차 대응 성과 악화 우려가 커지고 있다. 야당은 이번 자료를 근거로 주정부의 응급의료 대응 체계 문제를 지적하고 나섰다.
items.title_en: Ambulances arriving late to lower-priority patients in South Australia
items.title_ko: 남호주, 저우선도 환자 구급차 도착 지연 심각...야당 지적
items.title_original: Ambulances arriving late to lower-priority patients, SA opposition says

items.raw_excerpt: Hyderabad native Syed Sohail Uddin was stabbed in Utah, U.S.; MBT seeks support and justice for his family.
items.summary_en: Syed Sohail Uddin, a Hyderabad native, was stabbed in Utah, USA. MBT is seeking support and justice for his family. The incident highlights safety concerns for the community.
items.summary_ko: 하이데라바드 출신 시드 소하일 우딘 씨가 유타주에서 흉기에 찔렸습니다. MBT는 그의 가족을 위한 지원과 정의를 요구하고 있습니다. 이번 사건은 공동체의 안전 우려를 강조합니다.
items.title_en: Hyderabad Resident Stabbed in Utah; Community Seeks Support for Family
items.title_ko: 유타주에서 피습당한 하이데라바드 출신 주민, 공동체 지원 요청
items.title_original: Hyderabad resident stabbed in U.S.; MBT seeks support for family

items.raw_excerpt: Food recalls are common in Germany, and there are several reasons why products are pulled. Thankfully, you can check the status of recalls and whether something you’ve bought is affected.
items.summary_en: Germany regularly recalls food products for safety reasons. Consumers can check online whether any food they have bought is affected by a recall. This helps people stay safe and avoid eating dangerous products.
items.summary_ko: 독일에서는 안전상의 이유로 식품 제품들이 정기적으로 회수됩니다. 소비자는 자신이 구매한 제품이 회수 대상인지 온라인으로 확인할 수 있습니다. 이를 통해 위험한 제품의 섭취를 피하고 안전을 지킬 수 있습니다.
items.title_en: How to check food recall warnings in Germany
items.title_ko: 독일에서 식품 회수 경고를 확인하는 방법
items.title_original: How you can check for food recall warnings in Germany

items.raw_excerpt: Italian mountain guides have suspended climbs of Mont Blanc via the main route on the Italian side because heatwaves are destabilising the glacier leading to Europe's highest peak, an official told AFP on Wednesday.
items.summary_en: Mountain guides in Italy have stopped leading climbs up Mont Blanc from the Italian side. Heatwaves are making the glacier unstable and dangerous. The route leads to the highest peak in Europe.
items.summary_ko: 이탈리아 산악 가이드들이 몽블랑 이탈리아 측 주요 경로의 등반을 중단했다. 폭염으로 유럽 최고봉으로 향하는 빙하가 불안정해져 위험해졌기 때문이다.
items.title_en: Italian mountain guides stop Mont Blanc climbs due to heat
items.title_ko: 이탈리아 산악 가이드, 폭염으로 몽블랑 등반 중단
items.title_original: Heatwaves force Italian guides to halt Mont Blanc climbs

items.raw_excerpt: If you are looking for places to visit in the German state of Bavaria this summer, here are six of the most beautiful towns and villages to put on your list.
items.summary_en: This article highlights six beautiful towns and villages to visit in Bavaria, Germany. The spots are recommended as charming summer travel destinations. Each location offers unique scenery and local character.
items.summary_ko: 이 기사는 독일 바이에른 주에 있는 아름다운 마을 여섯 곳을 소개합니다. 각 마을은 매력적인 여름 여행지로 추천되고 있으며 독특한 풍경과 현지 분위기를 즐길 수 있습니다.
items.title_en: Six of the most charming Bavarian towns to visit this summer
items.title_ko: 이번 여름에 방문하기 좋은 바이에른의 가장 매력적인 여섯 마을
items.title_original: Six of the most charming Bavarian towns to visit this summer

items.raw_excerpt: Learning French in the classroom is one thing, launching into conversation with a French person is quite another - French language coach Llyane Stanfield has some tips for taking control so that conversations remain calm and comprehensible.
items.summary_en: French language coach Llyane Stanfield shares tips for taking control of conversations. She helps learners keep dialogues calm and easy to understand. The advice is for people who learned French in school but struggle with real conversation.
items.summary_ko: 프랑스어 강사 Llyane Stanfield가 대화를 주도하는 방법을 소개한다. 그녀는 학습자들이 대화를 차분하고 이해하기 쉽게 유지하도록 돕는다. 학교에서 프랑스어를 배웠지만 실제 대화가 어려운 사람들을 위한 조언이다.
items.title_en: The hidden art of taking control of French conversations
items.title_ko: 프랑스어 대화를 주도하는 숨겨진 기술
items.title_original: The hidden art of taking control of French conversations

items.raw_excerpt: Today's word of the day is as Danish as rugbrød, candlelit rooms and disappointing weather.
items.summary_en: The Local Denmark features the word 'Pæredansk' as the word of the day. It means something is very typically Danish, like dark bread and candlelit rooms.
items.summary_ko: 오늘의 덴마크어는 '페어레단스크'입니다. 루그브레드와 촛불로 밝힌 방처럼 아주 덴마크적인 것을 의미합니다.
items.title_en: Danish word of the day: Pæredansk
items.title_ko: 오늘의 덴마크어: 페어레단스크
items.title_original: Danish word of the day: Pæredansk

items.raw_excerpt: Some jobseekers in Switzerland have complained about being asked, during a recruitment process, to provide an extract from a debt enforcement office proving no defaulted payments. But is this practice legal?
items.summary_en: Some jobseekers in Switzerland are being asked to show a debt-free certificate from a debt enforcement office during recruitment. The practice has sparked complaints and raised questions about whether such requirements are legal under Swiss law.
items.summary_ko: 스위스 일부 구직자들이 채용 과정에서 채무집행관서에서 발급한 부채 없음 증명서를 제출하라는 요구를 받고 있다. 이 관행에 대한 불만이 제기되면서 스위스 법상 이러한 요구가 합법적인지 논란이 일고 있다.
items.title_en: Swiss Job Applicants Asked to Prove They Have No Debt
items.title_ko: 스위스 구직자들, 부채 없음을 증명하라는 요구에 불만
items.title_original: Can a Swiss employer ask you to prove you don't have debt problems?
